title: The Look
content:
Strephon kissed me in the spring,
Robin in the fall,
But Colin only looked at me
And never kissed at all.

Strephon's kiss was lost in jest,
Robin's lost in play,
But the kiss in Colin's eyes
Haunts me night and day.
meaning:
Sara Teasdale's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Look"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
